title: croton columnaris
intro: Croton columnaris, also known as the "Dragon's Blood Tree," is a species of plant native to Madagascar that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate blood flow and reduce inflammation. The plant's health benefits include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and even treat certain types of cancer. In herbal preparations, the plant's sap or resin is often extracted and used in tinctures, salves, or infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
